title: KubeJS Alchemistry/Chemlib
description: KubeJS Integration for Alchemistry and Chemlib
body: # KubeJS Alchemistry/Chemlib **KubeJSAlchem** is a powerful KubeJS addon designed to extend **Alchemistry** and **Chemlib**, allowing players and modders to create fully custom chemical elements, compounds, and alchemy recipes directly within Minecraft using JavaScript *** For detailed documentation and examples, visit the official [KubeJSAlchem Wiki](https://kubejs.com/wiki/addons/alchemistry-chemlib). *** ## Features ### Custom Elements Easily define new elements with properties such as atomic number, chemical group, period, matter state, metal type, color, and even custom effects. You can mark elements as artificial and assign them to groups, giving you total control over the periodic table in your modpack ### Custom Compounds Combine elements and other compounds to create unique chemical substances. Define compound colors, descriptions, and precise component ratios to simulate realistic or fantastical chemical behavior ### Alchemistry Recipes Seamlessly integrate with **Alchemistry machines** to create recipes for atomizers, compactors, combiners, and dissolvers. You can specify exact inputs, outputs, and probabilistic drops, making complex alchemical processes easy to implement ### Utility Functions KubeJSAlchem provides helpful functions for querying element properties, making it simple to display or manipulate chemical data in-game. Access information like atomic number, abbreviation, metal type, matter state, and active effects with ease ### Flexible & Modder-Friendly Whether you’re adding a single custom element or designing an entire chemistry system, KubeJSAlchem makes the process approachable and fully scriptable, empowering modders to expand Minecraft’s chemistry in creative ways *** [![Discord](https://imgur.com/9aqwB8I.png)](https://discord.gg/x8qSXbP67y) **Support & Feedback:** Join the [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/x8qSXbP67y) for bugs, suggestions, or general questions!
